PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?attendance WHERE {
  VALUES(?home ?away) {(wd:Q334634 wd:Q650840)(wd:Q650840 wd:Q334634)
  }
  ?game wdt:P1995 ?home ; wdt:P1996 ?away ; wdt:P1110 ?attendance .
  BIND(xsd:integer(REPLACE(STR(?attendance) , "[^0-9]" , "")) AS ?attNum)
  FILTER(?attNum > 0)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?attNum)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 2
